TestCase z8Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    if (t1.n1 > 0 && t1.a != NULL) {
        double* follow_case_a = (double*)malloc(t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
        if (follow_case_a != NULL) {
            memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
            follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
        }
    }
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n1 == 0
    if (follow_case.n1 <= 0 || follow_case.a == NULL) {
        // No elements to operate on or null pointer, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    // Find indices where elements are greater than -1
    int valid_indices_count = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n1; i++) {
        if (follow_case.a[i] > -1) {
            valid_indices_count++;
        }
    }
    if (valid_indices_count == 0) {
        // No element qualifies for replacement, return as is
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Randomly select one of these valid indices
    int chosen_index = -1;
    
    // To ensure randomness, use rand() % valid_indices_count
    // We must iterate again to find the chosen index
    
    int target_index_in_valid = rand() % valid_indices_count;
    int count = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n1; i++) {
        if (follow_case.a[i] > -1) {
            if (count == target_index_in_valid) {
                chosen_index = i;
                break;
            }
            count++;
        }
    }
    
    if (chosen_index != -1) {
        follow_case.a[chosen_index] = -1;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
